

Fooloshness is the [[triad]] of [[Seven Plagues|plagues]] in which [[Absurdity]], [[Modal Confusion]], and the [[Reflectiveness Gap]] fall into. These sins are called as such because they were mostly addressed by classical scholars such as [[Aristotle]] and [[plato]] in contrast to [[domicide]] which was more addressed by Hellenistic schools of thought such as [[stoicism]] 

Such plagues center around rationality and specific implementations of [[firmlaw]] over the community oriented ones of [[domicide]]

== Component plagues ==
λα [[Forgetting]]

λλ [[Spiralling]]

λω [[Drowning]]
== See Also ==

* [[Domicide]]
* [[Enstuckment]]
[[Category:Foolishness]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Foolishness]][[Category:Triads]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[sn:Foolishness]]
[[Category:Pages]]
